title: Spanish Patatas Bravas
description: A classic Spanish dish, Patatas Bravas is a comforting and flavorful recipe made with crispy potatoes and a spicy tomato sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
3. Add the chopped garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the crushed tomatoes, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and chili powder. Stir to combine.
5. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Meanwhile, peel the patatas and cut them into 2cm cubes.
7. Heat a separate pan with a little olive oil and fry the patatas until crispy.
8. Add the fried patatas to the tomato sauce and stir to combine.
9. Add the peas to the sauce and stir to combine.
10. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
